reasoning: The NFL and ESPN officially announced a major agreement in August 2025 in which the NFL will acquire a 10% equity stake in ESPN in exchange for NFL Network and other media assets. The Manifold market for this question was trading at a robust 85% on August 21, shortly after the announcement. While some industry publications (such as Sports Business Journal) have noted that regulatory reviews could potentially push the final closing into 2026, the very high market probability suggests that bettors are either confident in a late 2025 closing timeline or believe that signing a definitive, binding agreement before the end of the year will be sufficient to resolve the market as YES. I am aligning my estimate closely with the market at 83%, slightly discounting for the 2026 regulatory delay risk.
